scripts.tracks:fetch: uv run --with SpotAPI --with pymongo --with redis --with websockets 1001-albums/pipeline/scripts/fetch-1001-tracks.py --catalog book --output 1001-albums/pipeline/data/book-tracks-data.json
scripts.tracks:fetch:user: uv run --with SpotAPI --with pymongo --with redis --with websockets 1001-albums/pipeline/scripts/fetch-1001-tracks.py --catalog user --output 1001-albums/pipeline/data/user-tracks-data.json
scripts.tracks:kv:put:local: npx wrangler kv bulk put 1001-albums/pipeline/data/tracks-kv-bulk.json --binding TOOLS_KV --local
scripts.tracks:kv:put: npx wrangler kv bulk put 1001-albums/pipeline/data/tracks-kv-bulk.json --binding TOOLS_KV --remote
scripts.tracks:refresh:user: npm run tracks:fetch:user && npm run tracks:images && npm run tracks:apple-map && npm run tracks:kv:build && npm run tracks:kv:validate && npm run tracks:kv:put
scripts.tracks:refresh: npm run tracks:fetch && npm run tracks:fetch:user && npm run tracks:images && npm run tracks:apple-map && npm run tracks:kv:build && npm run tracks:kv:validate && npm run tracks:kv:put
